hero.sub: Book online in under a minute. Pick your barber, your service, the time that fits. No calls, no waiting.

manifesto.title: It's not just a haircut. It's the time you set aside for yourself.
manifesto.body: Razor, scissors, and time. At Brothers Club every visit is an unhurried ritual: reclined chair, hot towel, and a finish you can feel. You leave like you came in, only sharper.

local.title: A place built to linger.
local.lead: Pro tools, fresh coffee, and a chair with your name on it. The detail is in every corner.

services.title: What we do.
services.lead: Set prices. No surprises. Book what you need.
services.loadErrorBefore: We couldn't load the menu right now.
services.loadErrorAfter: and pick your service in the flow.
services.empty: We're prepping the menu. Check back in a moment.

booking.title: Book your cut
booking.subtitle: Pick service, barber and time. No account needed.
booking.configEmpty: Services or barbers aren't set up yet. Come back soon.

datetime.title: When?
datetime.empty: No open slots that day. Try another date.

errors.slotTaken: That slot was just taken. Please pick another.

metadata.title: Brothers Club Barbershop — Book your cut
metadata.description: Brothers Club Barbershop in Orlando, FL. Classic and modern cuts, editorial atmosphere. Book online in under a minute.
